insight: NoJetLag uses industrial/pilot-watch direction (NOT wellness category default). Dark mode primary, IBM Plex family, single amber accent #FFB000, no illustrations, no SF Symbols. Differentiates against Timeshifter (friendly-cartoon), Flykitt (sunset-gradient), StopJetLag (legacy). User-stated memorable thing: "for serious travelers."
